stories.title: Pulisic sits but U.S. finds a way vs. Australia to...
stories.summary: The USMNT was without Christian Pulisic on Friday, but it didn't matter: It found a way to beat Australia for its second win of this World Cup.

stories.title: No Pulisic? No problem: Freeman, Adams lead the wa...
stories.summary: Strong performances from Tyler Adams and Malik Tillman earned high ratings, but it was Alex Freeman who stood out.

stories.title: Freeman goal for U.S. 'full circle family moment'
stories.summary: U.S. defender Alex Freeman celebrated a "full-circle family moment" on Friday, scoring a goal in the Americans' 2-0 win over Australia on the same field -- kind of -- where his father, Antonio Freeman Jr., once had a banner day for the Green Bay Packers.

stories.title: U.S. winning the WC not 'ridiculous,' Richards say...
stories.summary: Zlatan Ibrahimovic was succinct in saying he thinks that the USMNT has a chance to win the World Cup. Chris Richards doesn't think it's a wild idea at all, either.

stories.title: Source: Big 12 monitoring Sorsby fallout, options
stories.summary: The Big 12 presidents and chancellors haven't rushed to pull the league's recently filed federal lawsuit because there are still questions about Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's NFL future and any possible legal retribution, a source told ESPN.
